Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG

Data.Name: Software Calibration Number resp. Calibration Identification resp. SCN

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: DataRead.Network Configuration - CAN PowertrainChassis Network Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Software Logical Block Part Number(s) Read
DataRead.Exhaust Regulation Or Type Approval Number (EROTAN) Read
DataRead.Software Calibration Number resp. Calibration Identification resp. SCN Read

DataItem.Name: Software Calibration Number resp. Calibration Identification resp. SCN

Request.Name: DataWrite.Network Configuration - CAN PowertrainChassis Network Write
DataWrite.Exhaust Regulation Or Type Approval Number (EROTAN) Write

Test.Description: ErrEntry_PdPressure_elctFltLo: A/C Refrigerant Pressure Sensor "A" Circuit Low circuit short to ground
ErrEntry_PdPressure_elctFltHi: A/C Refrigerant Pressure Sensor "A" Circuit High circuit short to battery
MON_3_VD: System Voltage no sub type information
VP_PWR_L_0: System Voltage Low circuit voltage below threshold
VP_PWR_L_3: System Voltage Low circuit current below threshold
VP_PWR_H_0: System Voltage High no sub type information
VP_PWR_H_3: System Voltage High circuit short to battery or open
Icsp_Ecop_DemFimGen_EveAtic113: Serial Communication Link
Icsp_Ecop_DemFimGen_EveAtic139Ps: Serial Communication Link
Icsp_Ecop_DemFimGen_EveAtic211_1: Serial Communication Link
Icsp_Ecop_DemFimGen_EveAtic211_2: Serial Communication Link
Icsp_Ecop_DemFimGen_EveAtic211_3: Serial Communication Link
NVM_E_WRONG_BLOCK_ID: Internal Control Module Memory Checksum Error no sub type information
NVM_E_REQ_FAILED: Internal Control Module Memory Checksum Error System Internal Failures
NVM_E_WRITE_PROTECTED: Internal Control Module Memory Checksum Error System Programming Failures
NVM_E_LOSS_OF_REDUNDANCY: Internal Control Module Memory Checksum Error Algorithm Based Failures
NVM_E_INTEGRITY_FAILED: Internal Control Module Memory Checksum Error general checksum failure
NVM_E_VERIFY_FAILED: Internal Control Module Memory Checksum Error general memory failure
NVM_E_QUEUE_OVERFLOW: Internal Control Module Memory Checksum Error special memory failure
Icsp_Ecop_DemFimGen_EveWrst: Internal Control Module Keep Alive Memory (KAM) Error no sub type information
MON_3_TMP: Control Module Processor no sub type information
MON_3: Control Module Processor System Internal Failures
Mon_ErrEntry_Range_Check: Internal Control Module Monitoring Processor Performance signal calculation failure
MON_3_DATA_PROT_1: Internal Control Module Main Processor Performance no sub type information
MON_3_SW: Internal Control Module Main Processor Performance System Internal Failures
MON_3_COD_PROT: Internal Control Module Main Processor Performance System Programming Failures
MON_3_DATA_PROT_0: Internal Control Module Main Processor Performance Algorithm Based Failures
Icsp_Ecop_DemFimGen_EveDtsOverTemp: Control Module Internal Temperature "A" Too High no sub type information
VCC_L_0: Sensor Reference Voltage "A" Circuit Low circuit short to ground
VCC_H_0: Sensor Reference Voltage "A" Circuit High circuit short to battery
VCC_L_1: Sensor Reference Voltage "B" Circuit Low circuit short to ground
VCC_H_1: Sensor Reference Voltage "B" Circuit High circuit short to battery
ErrEntry_PNM_AltWireDmg: Generator Control Circuit Range/Performance circuit open
RLY_MAIN_EL_OL: ECM/PCM Power Relay Control Circuit/Open no sub type information
RLY_MAIN_EL_SCG: ECM/PCM Power Relay Control Circuit Low no sub type information
RLY_MAIN_EL_SCP: ECM/PCM Power Relay Control Circuit High no sub type information
RLY_MAIN_PLAUS_ON: ECM/PCM Power Relay Sense Circuit/Open circuit short to ground
RLY_MAIN_DLY: ECM/PCM Power Relay De-Energized Performance - Too Late System Internal Failures
RLY_MAIN_PLAUS_OFF: ECM/PCM Power Relay Sense Circuit High no sub type information
VCC_L_2: Sensor Reference Voltage "C" Circuit Low circuit short to ground
VCC_H_2: Sensor Reference Voltage "C" Circuit High circuit short to battery
PWR_RLY_EL_OL_0: The signal ''Hot start'' from the automatic engine start/stop system has a malfunction. no sub type information
STST_HST_REQ_SCG: The signal ''Hot start'' from the automatic engine start/stop system has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
PWR_RLY_EL_SCP_1: The signal ''Hot start'' from the automatic engine start/stop system has a malfunction. circuit short to battery
PWR_RLY_EL_OL_1: The signal ''Hot start'' from the automatic engine start/stop system has a malfunction. circuit open
PWR_RLY_EL_SCG_0: The signal ''Hot start'' from the automatic engine start/stop system has a malfunction. circuit short to ground or open
PWR_RLY_EL_SCP_0: The signal ''Hot start'' from the automatic engine start/stop system has a malfunction. circuit short to battery or open
STST_HST_REQ_PLAUS: The signal ''Hot start'' from the automatic engine start/stop system has a malfunction. signal compare failure
STST_HST_REQ_TOUT: The signal ''Hot start'' from the automatic engine start/stop system has a malfunction. signal plausibility failure
CUSF_NVM_EveVarCodLost: An incorrect variant coding or configuration was detected. Invalid / Incompatible Software Component
ENG_FID_BYTE_0_0: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. no sub type information
ENG_FID_BYTE_0_1: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. General Electrical Failure
ENG_FID_BYTE_0_2: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. General Signal Failure
ENG_FID_BYTE_0_3: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
ENG_FID_BYTE_0_4: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. System Internal Failures
ENG_FID_BYTE_0_5: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. System Programming Failures
ENG_FID_BYTE_0_6: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. Algorithm Based Failures
ENG_FID_BYTE_0_7: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. Mechanical Failures

ENG_FID_BYTE_1_1: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. Component Failures

ENG_FID_BYTE_1_6: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ENG_FID_BYTE_1_7: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ENG_FID_BYTE_2_0: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. ISO/SAE reserved
ENG_FID_BYTE_2_1: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
ENG_FID_BYTE_2_2: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit short to battery
ENG_FID_BYTE_2_3: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit open
ENG_FID_BYTE_2_4: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit short to ground or open
ENG_FID_BYTE_2_5: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit short to battery or open
ENG_FID_BYTE_2_6: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit voltage below threshold
ENG_FID_BYTE_2_7: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit voltage above threshold
ENG_FID_BYTE_3_0: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit current below threshold
ENG_FID_BYTE_3_1: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit current above threshold
ENG_FID_BYTE_3_2: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit resistance below threshold
ENG_FID_BYTE_3_3: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit resistance above threshold
ENG_FID_BYTE_3_4: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit voltage out of range
ENG_FID_BYTE_3_5: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit current out of range
ENG_FID_BYTE_3_6: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit resistance out of range
ENG_FID_BYTE_3_7: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. circuit intermittent
ENG_FID_BYTE_4_0: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. ISO/SAE reserved
ENG_FID_BYTE_4_1: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal amplitude < minimum
ENG_FID_BYTE_4_2: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal amplitude > maximum
ENG_FID_BYTE_4_3: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal stuck low
ENG_FID_BYTE_4_4: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal stuck high
ENG_FID_BYTE_4_5: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal shape / waveform failure
ENG_FID_BYTE_4_6: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal rate of change below threshold
ENG_FID_BYTE_4_7: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal rate of change above threshold
ENG_FID_BYTE_5_0: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
ENG_FID_BYTE_5_1: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal invalid
ENG_FID_BYTE_5_2: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal stuck in range
ENG_FID_BYTE_5_3: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. Signal Cross Coupled
ENG_FID_BYTE_5_4: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ENG_FID_BYTE_5_5: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ENG_FID_BYTE_5_6: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ENG_FID_BYTE_5_7: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal erratic
ENG_FID_BYTE_6_0: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. ISO/SAE reserved
ENG_FID_BYTE_6_1: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. no signal
ENG_FID_BYTE_6_2: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal low time < minimum
ENG_FID_BYTE_6_3: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal low time > maximum
ENG_FID_BYTE_6_4: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal high time < minimum
ENG_FID_BYTE_6_5: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal high time > maximum
ENG_FID_BYTE_6_6: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal frequency too low
ENG_FID_BYTE_6_7: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal frequency too high
ENG_FID_BYTE_7_0: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal frequency incorrect
ENG_FID_BYTE_7_1: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal has too few pulses
ENG_FID_BYTE_7_2: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. signal has too many pulses

ENG_FID_BYTE_7_6: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ENG_FID_BYTE_7_7: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
CPC_FID_BYTE_0_0: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. no sub type information
CPC_FID_BYTE_0_1: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. General Electrical Failure
CPC_FID_BYTE_0_2: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. General Signal Failure
CPC_FID_BYTE_0_3: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
CPC_FID_BYTE_0_4: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. System Internal Failures
CPC_FID_BYTE_0_5: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. System Programming Failures
CPC_FID_BYTE_0_6: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. Mechanical Failures
CPC_FID_BYTE_0_7: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. Bus Signal / Message Failures

CPC_FID_BYTE_1_1: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
CPC_FID_BYTE_1_2: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. circuit short to battery
CPC_FID_BYTE_1_3: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. circuit open

CPC_FID_BYTE_1_7: Control unit ''Car Pad Module'' (CPM) has a malfunction. circuit voltage above threshold

PWR_RLY_PLAUS_OFF_2: no sub type information
ErrEntry_BrakeSwitch_Undef: Brake Pedal Switch "A" (Subfault) signal plausibility failure
Mon_ErrEntry_RawVal: The values of the brake pedal are implausible. signal plausibility failure
LOAD_CUR_L_AUX_BAT: The additional battery has a malfunction. Component Failures
LBG_AUX_BAT: The additional battery has a malfunction. circuit open
VP_PWR_L_1: The additional battery has a malfunction. circuit short to ground or open
VP_PWR_H_1: The additional battery has a malfunction. circuit short to battery or open
ErrEntry_PNM_SSMBackupBatVolt: The additional battery has a malfunction. circuit voltage below threshold
LOAD_CUR_L_AUX_BAT: The additional battery has a malfunction. circuit current below threshold
R_IT_H_AUX_BAT: The additional battery has a malfunction. circuit resistance above threshold
ErrEntry_PNM_BatTerm: The battery clamp of the starter battery has become detached or is defective. General Electrical Failure
ErrEntry_PNM_BatTerm: The battery clamp of the starter battery has become detached or is defective. circuit open
TEST_PLS_BAT_SCG: The output for charging/discharging the backup battery has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
TEST_PLS_BAT_SCP: The output for charging/discharging the backup battery has a malfunction. circuit short to battery
TEST_PLS_BAT_OC: The output for charging/discharging the backup battery has a malfunction. circuit open
VP_PWR_L_1: Multifunction input 1 has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
VP_PWR_H_1: Multifunction input 1 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery
VP_PWR_L_2: Multifunction input 2 has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
VP_PWR_H_2: Multifunction input 2 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery
VP_PWR_L_2: Multifunction input 2 has a malfunction. circuit voltage below threshold
VP_PWR_H_2: Multifunction input 2 has a malfunction. circuit voltage above threshold
ErrEntry_PNM_RdiTooHigh: The starter battery has excessive resistance. no sub type information
ErrEntry_PNM_RdiTooHigh: The starter battery has excessive resistance. circuit resistance above threshold
RLY_AUX_BAT_LIH_ACT: The power supply in the system is too low. circuit open
ErrEntry_PNM_IBSInternalFailure: There is an internal fault in the battery sensor. Component Failures
PWR_RLY_EL_SCG_2: The relay ''Additional battery'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
PWR_RLY_EL_SCP_2: The relay ''Additional battery'' has a malfunction. circuit short to battery
PWR_RLY_EL_OL_2: The relay ''Additional battery'' has a malfunction. circuit open
ErrEntry_PNM_BackupRelayCnt: The relay ''Additional battery'' has a malfunction. signal has too many transitions / events
ErrEntry_PNM_BackupRelayCtrl: The relay ''Additional battery'' has a malfunction. actuator stuck
RLY_AUX_BAT_LIH_ACT: The relay ''Decoupling of starter battery'' has a malfunction. System Internal Failures
PWR_RLY_EL_SCG_3: The relay ''Decoupling of starter battery'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
PWR_RLY_EL_SCP_3: The relay ''Decoupling of starter battery'' has a malfunction. circuit short to battery
PWR_RLY_EL_OL_3: The relay ''Decoupling of starter battery'' has a malfunction. circuit open
ErrEntry_PNM_DecoupleRelayCnt: The relay ''Decoupling of starter battery'' has a malfunction. signal has too many transitions / events
ErrEntry_PNM_DecoupleRelayCtrl: The relay ''Decoupling of starter battery'' has a malfunction. actuator stuck
ErrEntry_BusOff_CH: Vehicle Communication Bus B bus off
ErrEntry_ECM_MsgLost_OBD: Lost Communication With ECM/PCM "A" no sub type information
Mon_ErrEntryECM_MsgLost: Lost Communication With ECM/PCM "A" bus off
ErrEntry_ECM_MsgLost: Lost Communication With ECM/PCM "B" missing message
ErrEntry_SBC_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Vehicle Dynamics Control Module missing message
Mon_ErrEntryVDC_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Vehicle Dynamics Control Module bus off
Mon_ErrEntryDIFFLOCK_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Differential Control Module - Rear bus off
ErrEntry_BC_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Body Control Module missing message
Mon_ErrEntryBCM_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Body Control Module bus off
ErrEntry_CGW_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Gateway "A" missing message
Mon_ErrEntryHGW_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Gateway "A" bus off
ErrEntry_FCU_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Restraints Control Module missing message
ErrEntry_IC_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module missing message
ErrEntry_HVAC_MsgLost: Lost Communication With HVAC Control Module missing message
ErrEntry_SCCM_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Steering Column Control Module missing message
Mon_ErrEntryACU_MsgLost: Lost Communication With Special Purpose Vehicle Control Module "B" bus off
ErrEntry_Cpc_Routing_State: Invalid Data Received no sub type information
ErrEntry_ECM_MsgCheck_OBD: Invalid Data Received From ECM/PCM "A" no sub type information
Mon_ErrEntryECM_MsgCheck: Invalid Data Received From ECM/PCM "A" alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
ErrEntry_ECM_MsgCheck: Invalid Data Received From ECM/PCM "A" value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Mon_ErrEntryVDC_MsgCheck: Invalid Data Received From Vehicle Dynamics Control Module alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
Mon_ErrEntryBCM_MsgCheck: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
ErrEntry_IC_MsgCheck: Invalid Data Received From Instrument Panel Cluster Control Module value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Mon_ErrEntryDIFFLOCK_MsgCheck: Invalid Data Received From Differential Control Module - Rear alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
Mon_ErrEntryHGW_MsgCheck: Invalid Data Received From Gateway "A" alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
Mon_ErrEntryACU_MsgCheck: Invalid Data Received From Special Purpose Vehicle Control Module "B" alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
ErrEntry_BusOff_Vehicle: Communication with the vehicle CAN bus has a malfunction. bus off
ErrEntry_BMS_MsgLost: Communication with the battery sensor has a malfunction. missing message
ErrEntry_RDU_MsgLos: Communication with control unit ''Radar sensorics'' has a malfunction. missing message
Mon_ErrEntryADAS_MsgLost: Communication with control unit ''Radar sensorics'' has a malfunction. bus off
ErrEntry_WSS_NoPALeft: An implausible left front wheel speed signal was received. no sub type information
ErrEntry_WSS_NoPARight: An implausible right front wheel speed signal was received. no sub type information
ErrEntry_WSS_PALeft: An implausible left rear wheel speed signal was received. no sub type information
ErrEntry_WSS_PARight: An implausible right rear wheel speed signal was received. no sub type information
Mon_ErrEntryADAS_MsgCheck: Implausible data were received from control unit ''Radar sensorics''. alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
ErrEntry_PEIL_CAN1_HW0: Ignition Input On signal compare failure
ErrEntry_PEIL_CAN0_HW1: Ignition Input Off signal compare failure
